mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'SUPER_ADMIN' AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND email_verified = 1 AND password_enabled = 1 AND password IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(password) = 60 AND password REGEXP '^\\$2[aby]\\$1[0-4]\\$[./A-Za-z0-9]{53}$' AND email NOT IN ( 'admin@careertuner.dev', 'jiwon.kim@careertuner.dev', 'seoyeon.lee@careertuner.dev', 'minsu.park@careertuner.dev', 'pending@careertuner.dev' ) AND password <> '$2a$10$Po9I2ItGfYMIYNBOB/FvuONHDtGqhRrLzFYu1B5TDzSbyjDvQfzja' ORDER BY id FOR UPDATE
SELECT id, role, status FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT COUNT(*) = 1 FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND email_verified = 1 AND password_enabled = 1 AND password IS NOT NULL AND CHAR_LENGTH(password) = 60 AND password REGEXP '^\\$2[aby]\\$1[0-4]\\$[./A-Za-z0-9]{53}$' AND password <> '$2a$10$Po9I2ItGfYMIYNBOB/FvuONHDtGqhRrLzFYu1B5TDzSbyjDvQfzja' AND email NOT IN ( 'admin@careertuner.dev', 'jiwon.kim@careertuner.dev', 'seoyeon.lee@careertuner.dev', 'minsu.park@careertuner.dev', 'pending@careertuner.dev' )
